info.name: Oxxila-backend-api
info.description:
Oxxila e-commerce REST API.

## Structure

- **System** — `GET /` health (no `/api` prefix).
    
- **Authentication** — register/login, `GET /auth/me`, refresh, OAuth (Google/Facebook), forgot/verify/reset password.
    
- **Current User** — getMe, updateMe, avatar, password, active flags, **Profile addresses**, **Browsing history**, **Recommendations**.
    
- **Admin User Management** — admin-only user CRUD + moderation actions.
    
- **Categories & Sub-categories** — Categories, Sub-categories, nested routes, Brands. See `docs/CATEGORIES_API.md`.
    
- **Products** — list/filter (e.g. `isBestSeller`, `isBundle`, `allOffers`, `todayOffers`, `noOffers`, facets), optional-auth detail (`catalog` in response; browsing history when Bearer), admin multipart CRUD + toggle best seller.
    
- **Offers** — public list/upcoming/detail; admin CRUD + delete all (syncs `priceAfterDiscount` / `offerEndsAt` on products).
    
- **Banners** — public active banners; admin multipart create/update/delete.
    

## Tokens

- **Access token** (15m) — returned in the response body and stored in the `token` env var. Sent via `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`.
    
- **Refresh token** (7d) — set by the server as an `httpOnly`, `Secure`, `SameSite=Strict` cookie scoped to `/api/v1/auth`. Postman's Cookie Jar sends it automatically.
    

## Typical flow

Signup/Login → call protected endpoints → when the access token expires, call **Authentication / Signup & Login / Refresh Access Token** → new access token is saved to `{{token}}` → **Logout** revokes the session.

Select the `Oxxila Dev` or `Oxxila Prod` environment before sending requests.

item.name: Admin User Management

request.description: Supports filter (`?role=user`), search (`?keyword=...`), sort (`?sort=-createdAt`), field selection (`?fields=name,email`), and pagination (`?page`, `?limit`).
Creates any user, including admins. Password is hashed by the User model's pre-save hook.
Fetches a single user by Mongo ObjectId. Returns 404 if not found.
Updates arbitrary fields on a user. Password and role changes are stripped — use **Change Specific User Password** for passwords, and a future dedicated endpoint for role changes.
Hard-deletes a user document. Prefer **Deactivate Current User** for user-initiated offboarding.
Reactivates a previously deactivated account. Useful when a user's `deactivateMe` call needs to be undone by support.
Force-sets a user's password (no old-password check). The user's existing sessions become invalid on next refresh because `passwordChangedAt` is bumped.

item.description: Admin-only operations on user accounts. Requires a Bearer token belonging to a user with role `admin`.

item.name: Authentication
Signup & Login

exec: console.log('Saved access token + userId (refresh cookie handled by Postman)');

request.description: Creates a new account. Response body carries the 15-min access token; the 7-day refresh token is set as an httpOnly cookie. Saves `token` + `userId` to the active environment.

exec: console.log('Saved access token + userId (refresh cookie handled by Postman)');

request.description: Validates credentials. Returns a 15-min access token in the response body and sets a 7-day refresh token as an httpOnly cookie scoped to `/api/v1/auth`. Saves `token` + `userId` to the active environment.

exec: console.log('Rotated refresh cookie and saved new access token');

request.description: Reads the refresh token from the httpOnly cookie (Postman attaches it automatically), verifies it against the DB, rotates it (old is revoked, new one issued), and returns a fresh access token. Using a revoked refresh token revokes every session for the user (reuse detection).
Revokes the current refresh token in DB and clears the cookie. Intentionally unauthenticated so an expired access token can't block logout.

`GET /api/v1/auth/me` — returns a minimal public user from the JWT (`publicUser` shape). For the full Mongo profile (`addresses`, `phone`, `avatar`, …) use **Current User → Get Current User** (`GET /api/v1/users/getMe`).

item.description: Create an account, sign in, refresh the access token, or end the session.

item.name: Password Reset

request.description: Sends a password-reset link to the user's email. The link points to `${CLIENT_URL}/reset-password/<token>`. Always responds 200 to avoid leaking which emails are registered.

variable.description: Plain token from the email (same as in POST reset-password path)

request.description: `GET /api/v1/auth/reset-password/:token` — call before showing the new-password form. `400` with `Reset link is invalid or has expired` if bad.

exec: console.log('Saved new access token (all previous sessions revoked)');

variable.description: Plain reset token from the email link

request.description: Validates the token, checks newPassword === confirmPassword, sets the new password, and revokes all refresh sessions. Response is success only — re-login to obtain tokens. (Postman test script is optional: issue tokens on login/refresh only.)

item.description: Forgot-password flow. Both endpoints are unauthenticated.
Signup, login, session management, and password recovery.

item.name: Categories & Sub-categories

request.description: Admin. **multipart** (`form-data`) — `name` (required), optional `isActive`, optional `image` file. Slug is generated from `name`.
Public. Active categories with `subcategories` (active) populated. Optional `keyword`, `sort`, `fields`.
Public. One active category with subcategories. Set `{{categoryId}}` from Get All.
Admin. **multipart** — at least one of `name`, `isActive`, `image`.

variable.description: Removes this category and all its sub-categories

request.description: Admin. Deletes category and every nested sub-category.

item.name: Sub-categories

request.description: Admin. `POST` is **only** nested (parent in URL). `category` in body is set from `:categoryId` by the server. Slug from `name`.
Public. Flat list of all active sub-categories. Optional `?category=<ObjectId>` to filter in query.
Public. Single sub-category by id (not scoped to a parent in path).
Admin. **Nested** only — `PUT` must match the parent. Optional move to another `category` in body (ObjectId).
Admin. **Nested** only. Deletes one sub-category under the given parent.

item.description: Sub-category CRUD. Create / Update / Delete use nested routes under a category. Reads also available flat.

request.description: Admin. Same as **Sub-categories / Create Sub-category** — add a sub-category under a given category.

item.name: Get All Subcategories for Specific Category

request.description: Public. List active sub-categories for one category (path-scoped, not the flat list).

item.name: Brands

formdata.description: Optional — jpg, png, webp (field name: logo)

request.description: Admin. **multipart** (`form-data`) — `name` (required 2–50 chars), optional `description`, optional `isActive`, optional `logo` file. **Slug** is generated from `name` (not accepted in body).
Public. Active brands only. Optional `keyword`, `sort`.
Public. One active brand. Set `{{brandId}}` from **Get All Brands**.
Admin. **multipart** — optional `name`, `description`, `isActive`, `logo`. Slug follows `name` on save hooks where applicable.
Admin. Deletes one brand.

item.description: `Brand` resource at `/api/v1/brands`. Env: `{{brandId}}` (set from list response). Reads are public (`noauth`); writes use inherited Bearer.

Catalog folder layout: **Categories** (root) → **Sub-categories** (full set with correct URL patterns) → **Category / Sub-categories** (parent-scoped) → **Brands**. Public reads: **noauth**; admin: inherit collection Bearer. Env: `{{categoryId}}`, `{{subCategoryId}}`, `{{brandId}}`.

item.name: Products

query.description: Products with no active discount (no priceAfterDiscount or offer ended)

request.description: Public listing with ApiFeatures pagination/sort/keyword. Filters: category, subCategory (comma ids), brand, concerns (comma), `isSensitiveSkin`, `isCertified`, `isBestSeller`, `isBundle`, price range, `allOffers`, `todayOffers`, `noOffers`.
Public. If you send **Bearer** (logged-in user), the server appends this product to **Browsing history**.

formdata.description: Repeat field or JSON array per client; at least one id

request.description: **Admin** Bearer. Multipart: required `name`, `price`, `stock`, `category`, `subCategory` (array rules). Optional: `isBestSeller`, `isBundle`, images (max 5), `certificationImage`, `catalog` file (URL saved on `catalog`).
**Admin** Bearer. Partial updates via multipart; new files replace/add per controller logic. Optional booleans: `isBestSeller`, `isBundle`.
**Admin** Bearer. Flips `isBestSeller`.
**Admin** Bearer.

item.description: `/api/v1/products`. Env: `{{productId}}`. Public reads use **noauth**; writes need **admin** Bearer.

item.name: Offers

request.description: Nearest future active offer (`startDate` > now). Must be registered **before** `GET /:id` in the router.
Active offers where now is between `startDate` and `endDate`. Optional `?todayOffers=true`.
Single offer with populated product card fields.
**Admin** Bearer. ISO8601 dates; `endDate` after `startDate`. Only one active non-expired offer per product. Syncs product `priceAfterDiscount` / `offerEndsAt`.
**Admin** Bearer. Re-syncs affected products when product or discount window changes.
**Admin** Bearer. Clears synced pricing on the linked product.
**Admin** Bearer. `DELETE /` with no body — removes every offer and clears `priceAfterDiscount` / `offerEndsAt` on all affected products.

item.description: `/api/v1/offers`. Public: upcoming, list, get by id. Admin: create, update, delete one, delete all. Env: `{{offerId}}`.

item.name: Banners

request.description: Public list of `isActive` banners, newest `createdAt` first.
**Admin** Bearer. `image` file required. For `linkType` url use `externalUrl`; for product/category use `linkId`.
**Admin** Bearer. Optional new `image`; other fields merged.
**Admin** Bearer.

item.description: `/api/v1/banners`. Env: `{{bannerId}}`. Carousel assets uploaded to Cloudinary folder `oxxila/banners`.

item.name: Current User
Browsing & recommendations

request.description: Last 10 viewed products (populated). History is filled when a logged-in user calls **GET /api/v1/products/:id**.
Empties `browsingHistory` for the current user.
Products from top categories in your history, excluding already-viewed ids; capped at 20.

item.description: Requires Bearer. Uses history populated via authenticated product detail views.

item.name: Profile addresses

request.description: Returns `data.addresses` — use each entry’s `_id` in orders (e.g. dropdown). Phone for delivery is on the user (`GET getMe` / `phone` field), not on each address.

`POST` with `city` + `address` (required). **Requires** a non-empty `phone` on the user profile (`PATCH updateMe` first) — otherwise `400` with message about adding phone in account settings. Response includes the new subdocument in `data.address` (with `_id`).

variable.description: Subdocument _id from list or from add response

request.description: Send at least one of `city`, `address`. `404` if the id is not in your `addresses` array.
Removes one saved address by `_id`.

item.description: CRUD for embedded `user.addresses`. Requires Bearer token. Add flow depends on `phone` on the user; see **Update Current User**.

request.description: Full Mongo user document: `name`, `email`, `phone`, `avatar`, `addresses`, … (vs **Authentication → Get current user (auth /me)**, which returns a minimal `publicUser` shape). Requires Bearer token.

Sends any subset: `name`, `email`, `phone` (omit keys you are not changing). **Avatar** is not updated here — use **Upload Profile Image**.

- Google-linked users (`googleId` set) **cannot** change email: send `email` in the body with such an account → `400` `Google-linked accounts cannot change their email`.
- Add **`phone` on the profile** before using **Add address** (API requires a profile phone to add an address).

formdata.description: Image file — jpeg, jpg, png, or webp. Max 2 MB.

request.description:
Uploads a new avatar image to Cloudinary and replaces the previous one (old asset is destroyed). Send as `multipart/form-data` with a single `avatar` file field — do NOT set Content-Type manually, Postman adds the correct boundary.

Errors:
- `400` missing file, unsupported format, or larger than 2 MB
- `401` no / invalid access token
Verifies `oldPassword`, then updates to `newPassword`. On success, `passwordChangedAt` is bumped so other sessions fail on next refresh.
Sets `active=false` on the current user. Subsequent auth checks will reject the token with 403.
Sets `active=true` on the current user.

item.description: Self-service endpoints. All require a valid Bearer token. Includes browsing history and recommendations (history is built when you open a product detail with the same token).
